arts.ttl: Millwall keeper Lukas Jensen on departure of boss Neil Harris
arts.sum: “If you look at the last three games we have had some big chances and could have gone ahead in all of them,” said Jensen. I think as a team we did really well this year and if you look at Neil’s period of being at the club he did unbelievably, with all the stats and points gathered.

arts.ttl: Cantwell starts: Blackburn Rovers team news and predicted XI to face Millwall
arts.sum: The latest Blackburn Rovers team news as John Eustace's side gear up to face Millwall in the Championship. The post Cantwell starts: Blackburn Rovers team news and predicted XI to face Millwall appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: David Livermore keen to continue in supporting role to next Millwall head coach
arts.sum: Livermore, who played close to 300 games for Millwall between 1999-2006 and is in his second spell at the club as either youth manager or first-team assistant, is looking forward to his moment in the sun, but says he has no wish to make it permanent and won’t be treating it like an audition. “I’ve spoken with Steve (Gallen) and the chairman and I’ve told them I want my future to be at this football club.

arts.ttl: Steve Morison: Millwall links vital when hierarchy determine make-up of next management team
arts.sum: Morison, who scored 92 goals in 336 matches for the Lions, played in the same side as Harris as well as scoring the 2017 Wembley winner against Bradford to take the club into the Championship. “I’m not saying they have to get someone who has played for Millwall, but there has to be those people around it.
